name: Yogurt-Dill Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the plain low-fat yogurt, finely chopped onion, lemon juice, crushed dill weed, dry mustard, and garlic powder.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
3. Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Serve over tossed green salad. 2 tablespoons serving: free food exchange, 18 Calories Protein
1.5 grams Fat .4 grams Carbohydrates 2.1 grams Sodium 20 mg Potassium 68.2 mg Fiber 0 Cholesterol 2 mg Source: American Diabetes Assoc. Family Cookbook Vol II revised 1987
